chunks.title: Manasseh's Reign and Idolatry
chunks.reason: Describes Manasseh's early reign, his specific acts of idolatry, and the people's initial lack of response to Yahweh's warning.

chunks.title: Manasseh's Captivity and Return
chunks.reason: Narrates the Assyrian capture of Manasseh, his prayer in distress, and Yahweh's restoration of him to Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Manasseh's Reforms
chunks.reason: Details Manasseh's physical fortifications, removal of idols, and the people's continued practice of high place worship.

chunks.title: Records of Manasseh and Death
chunks.reason: References external chronicles regarding his prayer and sins, followed by the record of his death and succession.

chunks.title: Reign and Death of Amon
chunks.reason: Describes Amon's short reign, his failure to humble himself like his father, his assassination by servants, and the people's intervention.
